allow: Bash(venv/bin/python3 -c "from database import db; print\('DB connected'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Login OK, role:'''', d[''''user''''][''''role'''']\)")
Bash(venv/bin/python3 -c "import fastapi, motor, pydantic, jose, bcrypt; print\(''All core imports OK''\)")

Bash(venv/bin/python3 -c "
import ast, sys
files = [
    'server.py', 'models.py',
    'routes/auth.py', 'routes/fees.py', 'routes/marks.py',
    'routes/attendance.py', 'routes/students.py',
    'routes/employees.py', 'routes/announcements.py',
]
errors = []
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh: src = fh.read\(\)
        ast.parse\(src\)
        print\(f'  OK  {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        errors.append\(f'  ERR {f}: {e}'\)
        print\(errors[-1]\)
sys.exit\(1 if errors else 0\)
")

Bash(venv/bin/python3 << 'EOF'
import asyncio
from database import db

async def check\(\):
    # Verify brute-force collections exist / can be queried
    count = await db.login_attempts.count_documents\({}\)
    print\(f"login_attempts collection: {count} docs"\)
    
    # Verify UserBase has last_login
    from models import UserBase
    u = UserBase\(email="test@test.com", name="Test", role="admin"\)
    assert hasattr\(u, 'last_login'\), "last_login missing from UserBase"
    print\("UserBase.last_login: OK"\)
    
    # Verify MarkRecord validator works
    from models import MarkRecord
    try:
        bad = MarkRecord\(
            student_id="s1", exam_id="e1", class_name="5th", section="Blue",
            subject="Math", exam_type="unit_test", term="T1", academic_year="2025-2026",
            marks_obtained=90, max_marks=80, grade="A"
        \)
        print\("ERROR: MarkRecord should have rejected marks > max_marks"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"MarkRecord validation caught: {e}"\)
    
    good = MarkRecord\(
        student_id="s1", exam_id="e1", class_name="5th", section="Blue",
        subject="Math", exam_type="unit_test", term="T1", academic_year="2025-2026",
        marks_obtained=75, max_marks=80, grade="A"
    \)
    print\(f"MarkRecord valid entry: marks={good.marks_obtained}/{good.max_marks} OK"\)
    
    # Verify StudentBase has blood_group and emergency_contact
    from models import StudentBase
    s = StudentBase\(
        first_name="Test", last_name="Student", gender="Male",
        class_name="5th", section="Blue", blood_group="O+", emergency_contact="9876543210"
    \)
    assert s.blood_group == "O+", "blood_group not set"
    assert s.emergency_contact == "9876543210", "emergency_contact not set"
    print\(f"StudentBase.blood_group={s.blood_group} emergency_contact={s.emergency_contact}: OK"\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
EOF)
Bash(venv/bin/python -c "import asyncio; from database import db, client; asyncio.run\(db.command\('ping'\)\); print\('DB OK'\); client.close\(\)")
